scenarios.scenario: Agent needs to create a catalog for rendering AI-generated dashboard widgets
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill provides defineCatalog() API with Zod schema props, registry mapping pattern, and minimal working example
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent retrieves correct defineCatalog() signatures and component registration pattern from SKILL.md or references/api/components.md

scenarios.scenario: Agent needs to choose between StateStore and Zustand adapter for a dashboard
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill's state management decision tree routes: read-only → $state, two-way → $bindState, Zustand → adapter
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent follows decision tree and selects correct state strategy for the described use case

scenarios.scenario: Agent needs to set up json-render in a Next.js sidecar with @json-render/shadcn
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill's ecosystem routing table and cross-stack integration guide point to stack-nextjs and the related packages table
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent loads stack-nextjs per ecosystem routing and references the @json-render/shadcn package from related packages table
